tasks.title: Harden evidence, secrets, paths, state, YAML and CI contracts
tasks.goal: Remove known false-success paths from the AgentOS release-candidate gates.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Enforce AgentOS RC trust gates with negative tests and cross-platform CI.
agentGoal.outcome: Evidence, secret scanning, paths, state, YAML, doctor and CI fail closed.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run doctor, npm run validate, npm test and GitHub Actions
constraints: Do not add medium-term product functionality.
Do not execute a real deployment.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Use test-first changes and keep each validator responsibility explicit.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three identical blockers or when an external review is required.

acceptanceCriteria: Verified evidence cannot represent false success.
Secret scanning evaluates and redacts each occurrence.
Operational paths cannot escape the repository root.
Agent goals, state and YAML configuration are structurally valid.
Doctor, local validation and Windows/Linux CI fail closed.
